name: Palladium Oracle Mahad
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>護</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>官</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マハード
desc: When you draw this card: You can reveal this card; Special Summon it from your hand. If this card battles a DARK monster, its ATK is doubled during the Damage Step only. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Dark Magician" from your hand, Deck, or GY.
mnst_eff: When you draw this card: You can reveal this card; Special Summon it from your hand. If this card battles a DARK monster, its ATK is doubled during the Damage Step only. If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Dark Magician" from your hand, Deck, or GY.
